race.description: Carbine Club Of South Australia Inc Hcp
race.comment: BRED 'EM ALL (3) impressed on debut, driving strongly through the line to score. He's sure to have improved from that experience and draws to get every favour. A repeat of that effort can see him remain unbeaten. MISS CHEVALIER (13) is a promising Maurice filly on debut for Will Clarken. She's impressed in her lead-up work, recording a dominant trial at the latest. Can make an immediate impact. SASSY FOR SURE (9) never featured after settling too far back here last time but had been building towards a win prior. She's proven frustrating, though the switch to Lloyd could spark a change in fortunes. SHOCAP (6) also settled a long way off them last start, but her first two runs this prep had plenty of merit against handy opposition. The draw is tricky, though Schofield takes over and can help offset it. MISS ORTH (14) is big odds but was solid fresh over 900m at Newcastle and now gets the Wizard, Pike, aboard. She can spice up the wider exotics.
